name: Riversand MDM & PIM Cloud API
what_it_does: Riversand Cloud MDM and PIM REST API for product information and master data management. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog creation and enrichment workflows, handle supplier onboarding and data collaboration, access entity relationship modeling for complex product hierarchies, retrieve data quality scoring and validation workflows, manage digital asset and media linking to product records, handle omnichannel product syndication and publication, access supplier portal data exchange and collaboration, retrieve workflow orchestration for product data approval, manage taxonomy and classification data, and integrate product master data with e-commerce, ERP, and marketplace platforms.
use_cases: Managing product catalog enrichment from retailer PIM automation agents
Onboarding supplier product data from supplier portal automation agents
Syndicating product information to channels from omnichannel commerce agents
Maintaining product master data quality from data governance agents
not_for: Simple product database management without enterprise MDM complexity
Customer or employee master data without product information focus
Open-source PIM without enterprise cloud MDM requirements
best_when: A retailer, manufacturer, or distributor using Riversand wants AI agents to automate product data enrichment, supplier collaboration, data quality enforcement, taxonomy management, and omnichannel syndication.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated product data enrichment and publishing can propagate incorrect product information across all channels — data quality validation gates before publication are essential. Supplier data onboarding automation must verify completeness and compliance before golden record promotion.

auth.notes: Riversand uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for REST and GraphQL API access. Tenant-level credentials with entity, workflow, and catalog scopes. Developer documentation and partner portal. Webhooks for entity and workflow events. GraphQL for flexible product data queries. Tenant-based multi-tenant architecture.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription based on SKU volume and users; custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Houston, Texas. Founded 2007. Cloud-native MDM and PIM platform. Acquired by Syndigo (2021). Strong retail and consumer goods focus. Used by Home Depot and Walgreens. Supplier portal for collaborative data exchange. GraphQL API support. Competes with Stibo Systems and Akeneo for cloud MDM/PIM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per tenant; bulk entity import APIs available

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Product data publication to channels is hard to retract — implement staging and approval gates before automated publish
GraphQL and REST both available — prefer GraphQL for complex product hierarchy queries
No public MCP server — enterprise tenant-based API requiring commercial agreement
Syndigo acquisition — verify product roadmap continuity under new ownership
Tenant isolation — multi-tenant API requires correct tenant context in all API calls
Workflow dependencies — entity state machine must be understood before automating approval workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product master data and supplier data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product catalog and supplier relationship data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product MDM and PIM data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product catalog and supplier data.
